summary: Complete testing of 5 Listings Page Enhancements + Availability Navigation. All 24 backend API tests passed. All frontend features verified with Playwright.

minor.issue: Missing newline between CORS_ORIGINS and EMERGENT_LLM_KEY caused storage initialization failure
minor.resolution: Fixed by adding newline - photo upload now works

critical_code_review_comments: Multi-month pricing selection works with chip-based UI
Clickable listings navigate to /listings/:id detail page
Image carousel with prev/next navigation works correctly
Admin UI for editing title/description and uploading photos works
Date-range search filters listings by availability
Direct URLs for individual listings work (/listings/:id)
Availability calendar supports month navigation (prev/next) and count toggle (3/6/12mo)
Password gate blocks admin app at / until correct password entered
/listings page is publicly accessible without password
passed_tests: GET /api/public/listings/{unit_id} returns single listing with photos, pricing, description
All 3 known units accessible via direct URL
POST /api/public/admin/pricing with multiple entries saves all
Setting new price for existing month overwrites it
Full photo upload and delete flow works
Detail page shows image carousel with prev/next navigation
Detail page shows title, price, description
Month calendars show pricing or 'Contact for pricing'
See All Listings button navigates back to /listings
Admin section on detail page unlocks with password
Edit Listing form shows title and description inputs
Upload photo button present in admin section
Multi-month pricing chips present in admin section
Password gate blocks admin app at /
Password gate shows error for wrong password
Password gate grants access with correct password 'emergeontop'
seed_data_creation: Set pricing for multiple months during testing (Jul-Sep 2026 for Unit 7, Oct-Nov 2026 for Unit 8). Updated title for Unit 8 to 'Test Updated Title'. Uploaded test photos.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 listings enhancements + availability navigation fully tested. Key data-testids: listings-page, listings-grid, listing-card-link, listing-title, listing-price, date-search, search-start-date, search-end-date, search-button, clear-search, listing-detail-page, image-carousel, carousel-prev, carousel-next, listing-info, detail-title, detail-price, check-availability-button, see-all-listings-link, availability-dialog, avail-count-3/6/12, avail-prev, avail-next, month-calendar, detail-admin-section, detail-admin-password, detail-admin-unlock, edit-details-button, edit-title-input, edit-description-input, save-details-button, upload-photo-button, detail-month-chip-{month}-{year}, detail-price-input, detail-set-price-button, admin-pricing-section, admin-password-input, admin-unlock-button, admin-unit-select, month-chip-{month}-{year}, price-input, set-price-button, password-gate, password-gate-input, password-gate-submit, password-gate-error. Backend endpoints: /api/auth/verify-password, /api/public/listings, /api/public/listings/{id}, /api/public/listings/{id}/availability (with start_year, start_month, num_months params), /api/public/admin/pricing, /api/public/admin/pricing/delete, /api/public/admin/listings/{id}, /api/public/admin/listings/{id}/photos, /api/public/admin/listings/{id}/photos/delete. Password: 'emergeontop'.
